title: Lead Boots prevents non-kill creature removal or control change

card.rawText: Can only be equipped to a primary creature. The equipped creature cannot leave the field or change control unless killed. This card cannot be removed from the field unless destroyed.

effect.value: Cannot leave field or change control unless killed

plan.title: Lead Boots prevents non-kill creature removal or control change
plan.summary: Verify the equipped creature cannot leave field or change control unless killed.

notes: Pre-place Lead Boots on field magic slot attached to player_1 primary creature.
